title: Marico is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Marico is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Marico has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Marico:
Marico is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marico!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
